name: Sopa Leao Vellosa
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the bouquet garni by tying a celery stalk with peppercorns, whole cloves, and parsley.
2. Cut off the head of the grouper and slice the fish into 1-inch steaks. Set aside.
3. Place the grouper head in a large pot of cold water. Add salt and bring to a boil. Then add the bouquet garni. Cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours. Discard the fish head and bouquet garni, reserving the edible parts of the fish head.
4. Using the fish stock, cook the shrimps in their shells for 10 minutes or until they turn pink. Remove, discard the shells and black veins, and reserve the shrimp.
5. Using the same stock, heat the mussels or clams in their shells for 5 minutes or until the shells open. Remove from the stock, remove the seafood from the shells, and reserve.
6. Strain the stock to remove any sand or shell particles.
7. Use a little olive oil to saute onions, garlic, tomatoes, coriander, parsley, and cayenne pepper just until the vegetables soften. Add this mixture to the fish stock.
8. Heat remaining oil and gently fry the grouper steaks. Remove the skin and bones, break the grouper into pieces, and add it to the stock mixture along with crab meat, lobster meat, shrimp, mussels, and the edible part of the grouper head.
